title: Stacks, Queues, Deques, and Monotonic Structures · Algorithm Stakeholder Mission
summary: A monitoring team needs predictable history and alert-window operations. Implement and compare sequence, linked, stack, queue, and deque structures under boundary workloads. Planned artifact: Deliver Reliable Event Buffer Engine with acceptance evidence, rubric defense, reflection, and a changed-constraint extension. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Specify inputs, outputs, preconditions, postconditions, and invalid cases before selecting an algorithm.
State partial and total correctness claims that can be challenged by counterexamples.
Construct normal, boundary, duplicate, empty, sorted, reversed, and adversarial cases.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
